QW-280  SPECIAL PROCESS VARIABLES. (a) Welding processes with unique characteristics may have additional essential variables as required by this paragraph. (b) For electron beam, laser beam, and friction welding, variables herein supplement those in QW-250. (c) Changes to these special variables require requalification in accordance with QW-200, subject to QW-202. See also QW-250 for standard variables. Performance qualification for special processes shall comply with QW-300, except as permitted by QW-350 for certain variable changes. Test requirements shall be in accordance with QW-150, unless exempted by QW-160 for specific joint types.
